page.title: Marbella Birthday Yacht Party: Custom Decorations and Themes

data.meta_description: Plan a marbella birthday yacht party with custom decorations and themes. Hire a 12m yacht from €749/2h. Book your celebration today.
data.summary: Celebrate your birthday on a private yacht in Marbella with custom decorations and themes. Choose from our fleet of luxury boats departing Puerto Banús, with packages from €749/2h.
key_facts: Yacht birthday parties from €749/2h (Tier A boats, 9-11 pax).
Custom decorations and themes available on request.
All charters include skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, and insurance.
Fleet includes Astondoa 40, Azimut 39, Mangusta 80, and more.
Depart from Puerto Banús, explore Costa del Sol coast.
Maximum capacity varies from 5 to 12 pax per boat.
Free jet ski included on Mangusta 80 bookings (min 4h).

faq.q: Can I bring my own decorations for a birthday yacht party in Marbella?
faq.a: Yes, you are welcome to bring your own decorations such as balloons, banners, and table settings. Please coordinate with our team in advance to ensure setup is possible within the charter time. We can also arrange custom decorations and themes for an additional fee.

faq.q: What themes are available for a birthday yacht party?
faq.a: We offer a range of themes including tropical luau, glamorous white party, nautical chic, and more. You can also request a custom theme to match your party's vibe. Contact us via WhatsApp to discuss your ideas and we will provide a quote.

faq.q: How much does a birthday yacht party with decorations cost?
faq.a: Our Tier A boats (Astondoa 40, Azimut 39) start at €749 for 2 hours, including skipper, drinks, and snacks. Custom decorations and themes are priced on request. For larger boats like the Mangusta 80, prices start at €4,719 for 4 hours, which includes a free jet ski.

faq.q: What is included in the birthday yacht party package?
faq.a: Every charter includes a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish IVA (21%). Custom decorations and themes are additional and can be arranged upon request.

faq.q: How many guests can I invite to a birthday yacht party in Marbella?
faq.a: Guest capacity depends on the yacht. Our smaller boats like the Dubhe (8m) hold up to 5 guests, while larger vessels like the Mangusta 80 (24m) accommodate up to 12 guests. Check our fleet page for exact capacities per boat.

faq.q: Can I play my own music on the yacht?
faq.a: Yes, all our yachts are equipped with Bluetooth or auxiliary audio systems, so you can play your own playlist. For a more festive atmosphere, you can also request a DJ or sound system upgrade (additional cost).

faq.q: What is the best time of year for a birthday yacht party in Marbella?
faq.a: The best time is from May to October, when temperatures range from 25°C to 35°C and seas are calm. However, we operate year-round, and spring and autumn offer pleasant conditions with fewer crowds.

faq.q: How do I book a birthday yacht party with custom decorations?
faq.a: Contact us via WhatsApp or through our website to check availability and discuss your decoration preferences. We recommend booking at least one week in advance, especially for custom themes, to ensure everything is ready.

data.body_html:
Celebrate your next birthday in style with a private yacht party in Marbella. Whether you want a quiet sunset cruise with close friends or a full-blown themed bash on the water, our fleet of luxury boats departing from Puerto Banús offers the perfect setting. With custom decorations and themes available, you can personalise every detail to make your special day unforgettable. Prices start from €749 for 2 hours on our Tier A boats, including skipper, drinks, and snacks.

Why Choose a Yacht for Your Birthday Party?

A yacht party in Marbella is more than just a venue—it's an experience. You'll cruise along the Costa del Sol, taking in views of La Concha mountain, the Golden Mile, and exclusive marinas like Puerto Banús and Cabopino. The privacy of a private charter means you control the music, the guest list, and the vibe. Plus, with all-inclusive packages covering drinks and snacks, you can focus on celebrating.

Custom Decorations and Themes

We offer a range of custom decorations and themes to match your party style. Popular options include tropical luau with palm leaves and tiki torches, glamorous white party with elegant drapes and fairy lights, nautical chic with navy and white accents, or a custom theme based on your favourite colours or motifs. Our team can arrange balloons, banners, table centrepieces, and even personalised cake stands. Simply let us know your vision via WhatsApp, and we'll provide a quote.

Our Birthday Party Yacht Fleet

BoatLengthMax PaxStarting Price
Astondoa 4012.5m9€749/2h
Azimut 3912.5m11€749/2h
Mangusta 8024m12€4,719/4h
Azimut 58 Flybridge17.6m12On request
Ferretti 9429m12On request

For larger groups, our Mangusta 80 (24m, 12 pax) includes a free jet ski on bookings of 4 hours or more. All boats depart from Puerto Banús.

What's Included in Every Charter

Every birthday yacht party includes a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish IVA (21%). Custom decorations and themes are additional and arranged upon request. You can also bring your own decorations—just coordinate with us in advance.

Popular Birthday Party Itineraries

Most birthday charters depart from Puerto Banús and cruise east towards Marbella Marina and Cabopino, or west towards Estepona and Sotogrande. A 2-hour trip is perfect for a short celebration with drinks and photos, while a 4-hour charter allows time for swimming at Cala del Faro or Cala Cortés. For a full-day party (8 hours), you can anchor near a beach club or enjoy a sunset cruise back to port.

How to Book Your Birthday Yacht Party

Booking is easy. Contact us via WhatsApp or through our website to check availability for your preferred date and boat. We recommend booking at least one week in advance for custom decorations. Discuss your theme, guest count, and any special requests—our team will handle the rest. Explore all our Marbella boat rental options to find the perfect vessel for your celebration.

Frequently Asked Questions

Can I bring my own decorations for a birthday yacht party in Marbella?

Yes, you are welcome to bring your own decorations such as balloons, banners, and table settings. Please coordinate with our team in advance to ensure setup is possible within the charter time. We can also arrange custom decorations and themes for an additional fee.

What themes are available for a birthday yacht party?

We offer a range of themes including tropical luau, glamorous white party, nautical chic, and more. You can also request a custom theme to match your party's vibe. Contact us via WhatsApp to discuss your ideas and we will provide a quote.

How much does a birthday yacht party with decorations cost?

Our Tier A boats (Astondoa 40, Azimut 39) start at €749 for 2 hours, including skipper, drinks, and snacks. Custom decorations and themes are priced on request. For larger boats like the Mangusta 80, prices start at €4,719 for 4 hours, which includes a free jet ski.

What is included in the birthday yacht party package?

Every charter includes a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish IVA (21%). Custom decorations and themes are additional and can be arranged upon request.

How many guests can I invite to a birthday yacht party in Marbella?

Guest capacity depends on the yacht. Our smaller boats like the Dubhe (8m) hold up to 5 guests, while larger vessels like the Mangusta 80 (24m) accommodate up to 12 guests. Check our fleet page for exact capacities per boat.

Can I play my own music on the yacht?

Yes, all our yachts are equipped with Bluetooth or auxiliary audio systems, so you can play your own playlist. For a more festive atmosphere, you can also request a DJ or sound system upgrade (additional cost).

What is the best time of year for a birthday yacht party in Marbella?

The best time is from May to October, when temperatures range from 25°C to 35°C and seas are calm. However, we operate year-round, and spring and autumn offer pleasant conditions with fewer crowds.

How do I book a birthday yacht party with custom decorations?

Contact us via WhatsApp or through our website to check availability and discuss your decoration preferences. We recommend booking at least one week in advance, especially for custom themes, to ensure everything is ready.
